title: Store-cli timestamp auto-population + record-usage + collate cost aggregation
description: Three related tool-layer fixes: (1) store-cli write bug auto-populates real ISO datetimes when agent supplies date-only YYYY-MM-DD values; (2) new store-cli record-usage subcommand writes token-usage sidecars programmatically; (3) collate --purge-events aggregates cost data from event files into bug markdown artifact before purging.
